AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RICHARD FEDERSON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 AT 1:30 PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEROME, DON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ABZUG, MARK AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST RICHARD FEDERSON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
